'''Yang Water Dog''' is the 59th of the sixty nodes of the [[Sexagenary cycle|Divine Sixty]], the great cycle that the [[Heavenly stems|heavenly stems]] and [[Earthly Branches|earthly branches]] trace across the ringworld's calendar of [[Gaia]] and [[Luna]].

Its stem is 壬 Mizunoe (yang water, the gaia-aligned face of winter), and its branch is 戌 Inu, the [[Dog (zodiac)|Dog]] hour. Within the [[Wuxing]] reading of the node, the branch's earth overcomes the stem's water, the lower restraining the high.

On the [[The divine 60|Divine Sixty]] lattice this position falls between [[Yin Metal Rooster]] (node 58) and [[Yin Water Pig]] (node 60).

== Stem and branch ==
* '''Stem:''' [[Mizunoe (壬)]] — yang water
* '''Branch:''' [[Dog (zodiac)|Dog (戌)]] — yang earth
* '''Celestial body:''' [[Gaia]]
* '''Element-season:''' winter

== See also ==
* [[The divine 60]]
* [[Sexagenary cycle]]
* [[Heavenly stems]]
* [[Earthly Branches]]
* [[Yin Metal Rooster]] — preceding node
* [[Yin Water Pig]] — following node

{{wikidata link|Q904937}}
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle]]
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]]
[[Category:Ringworld]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
